boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: service account permission change within registered owner scope.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records fail to close the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing service owner and permission scope remains unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Need exact owner and permission scope before execution.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The frozen source records do not close the exact action boundary because the service owner and permission scope are missing or mismatched. Policy requires exact source closure before any access or permission change. Escalate until the controlling record explicitly resolves that dependency.
